Becky G.biografia: Rebbeca Marie Gomez, known professionally as Becky G, was born in Los Angeles on March 2, 1997. She is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter. Her musical career began in 2009 when she joined a girl group called G.L.A.M., and later another group named B.C.G.. Before her music career took off, Becky had already made small appearances in modeling and acting. Her breakthrough came in 2011 when she posted a remake of Kanye West and Jay-Z’s Otis on YouTube. Duncan Dhu.biografia: Duncan Dhu was a Spanish pop-rock group of the 1980s. The group was founded in San Sebastian, Spain in 1984 by singer Mikel Erentxun (Aristogatos), and Diego Vasallo, and Juan Ramón Viles (Los Dalton). The name Duncan Dhu comes from the book "Kidnapped: The adventures of David Balfour" by Robert Louis Stevenson where there is a character named Duncan Dhu, who is a lover of music. Their style was based on an acoustic and simple pop-rock with a touch of rockabilly in great contrast with the more radical rock played in the area at the time. Read more on Last.fm
